name: cpp-rapid-rest-template
description: C++20 REST API template — Drogon + libpqxx + redis-plus-plus + Kafka + observability
$comment: libsodium and libcurl come from the OS (apt: libsodium-dev, libcurl4-openssl-dev) — vcpkg's libsodium port fails to build on arm64-linux. inja is fetched header-only via CMake FetchContent (see CMakeLists.txt). Both choices keep the docker build green on x86_64 and arm64.
